long_desc: Gasper, the Guru of Time stares at the infinity.
detailed_desc:
Gasper, the Guru of Time is and old man, with a brown cape and a strange
hat. He looks at you and says: "Hey, time is important, you can do nothing
without time. Be sure to control your time with wisdom. This way your time
would be never so great or small. Everyone has a time, the secret is to
know what is your time, hehehehe."
